title: pyrus atrovirens
intro: Pyrus atrovirens, also known as the Chinese wild pear, is a species of deciduous tree or shrub native to China. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pyrus atrovirens include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of the common cold. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
